[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101 2
1 0010011 3
2 1101011 5
3 1111111 a
4 0101100 3
5 0111111 6
6 1111100 5
7 1011111 6

45 54 1111100 5 match 6

67 76 1010011 4
70 07 1111011 6

71 17 1011111 6 match 7

72 27 1111111 a match 3
